ok.description: Baseline page. No runtime error should be reported.

warning-only.description: Uses console.warn only. Should not fail the run.

runtime-error.description: Throws an uncaught runtime error after load.

mixed-errors.description: Produces both console.error and a rejected promise.

async-runtime-error.description: Throws asynchronously after a longer delay.

missing-base-object.description: Accesses a property on an undefined base object.

missing-method-call.description: Calls a method that does not exist on an object.

missing-nested-property-call.description: Reads a missing property and immediately dereferences it.

missing-nested-property-log.description: Evaluates console.log(a.xxx.bbb) where the middle property is undefined.

missing-property-read-only.description: Reads a missing property only. The value is undefined, but no runtime error is thrown.

caught-runtime-error.description: Throws inside try/catch and swallows the error, so no global runtime error is reported.
